ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the plant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the plant */,
  "plant_type" TEXT /* Type of the plant (e.g., Chemical, Manufacturing) */,
  "industry_type" TEXT /* Industry type of the plant */,
  "production_capacity" REAL /* Production capacity of the plant */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., Temperature, Humidity, Ambient) */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibrated" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of sensor calibration */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant where the location is */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the reading */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant where the reading was taken */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the reading was taken */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading */,
  "air_temp" REAL /* Air temperature reading */,
  "ambient_temp" REAL /* Ambient temperature reading */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES sensor_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant where the alert was generated */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the alert was generated */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., Temperature, Humidity) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the alert (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES sensor_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Operator, Engineer, Admin) */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant the user is associated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, Logout) */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant the user accessed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of the maintenance (e.g., Calibration, Repair) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of the maintenance (e.g., Routine, Emergency) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_maintenance_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant where the operation occurred */,
  "operation_date" TEXT /* Date of the operation */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of the operation (e.g., Production, Shutdown) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the operation */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the operation */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the operation */,
  "production_output" REAL /* Production output of the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_operations_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the calibration */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the calibration */,
  "next_calibration_due" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant that was calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the calibration */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the calibration */,
  "next_calibration_due" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_calibrations_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the reading */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant where the reading was taken */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the reading was taken */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading */,
  "air_temp" REAL /* Air temperature reading */,
  "ambient_temp" REAL /* Ambient temperature reading */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_history_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_history_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES sensor_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_history_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert being logged */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the log entry (e.g., Created, Acknowledged, Resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of the threshold (e.g., Min, Max) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
